description: What function handles the blast_radius MCP tool in the knowing codebase? In which file is it defined?
How does the context engine score symbols? What is the formula, and what weights are applied to each component?
If I change the Node struct in internal/types/types.go, what breaks? Which packages and callers depend on it?
How does the Louvain community detection work in the knowing codebase? Walk me through the algorithm implementation.
What test files exist for the snapshot package, and what aspects of the package do they cover?
How does the hierarchical Merkle tree improve diff performance in the knowing codebase? What is the algorithmic improvement over a flat diff?
What edge types does the knowing graph support and where are they defined? List all supported edge type strings.
Trace the data flow in the knowing daemon from a git commit (file save) to cache invalidation. Which functions are involved and in what order?
